title: Byrdpip
description: Upon pickup, gain the card [gold]Byrd Swoop[/gold]. A [gold]Byrdpip[/gold] will accompany you in battles.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic spawns a Byrdpip pet that accompanies the player in battles. Upon pickup, all Byrdonis Egg cards in your deck are transformed into Byrd Swoop cards. The relic has 4 random skin variants.
